ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the class is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of class IDs that are prerequisites for this class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class to which this schedule belongs */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ..., 6 = Saturday) */,
  "time_from" INTEGER /* Start time of the class in minutes from midnight */,
  "time_to" INTEGER /* End time of the class in minutes from midnight */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Identifier for the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the schedule */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room allocated for the class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the schedule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., building and room number) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* JSON array of office hours (e.g., [{"day": 1, "time_from": 720, "time_to": 900}]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom (number of students it can accommodate) */,
  "building" TEXT /* Name of the building where the room is located */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the room */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., classroom, lab, seminar room) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* JSON array of equipment available in the room (e.g., ["projector", "whiteboard"]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room allocation */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule for which this room is allocated */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room allocated for the class */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the room allocation is confirmed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the allocation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_allocations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_allocations_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
